nodes.name: When Called by Generate Video
nodes.notes: Binary data (video file) is automatically passed from calling workflow

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const getNodeData = (name) => { try { return $(name).item?.json ?? null; } catch (error) { return null; } }; const run = getNodeData('Get a row') ?? {}; const stages = run.stages ?? {}; const clone = (value) => (value && typeof value === 'object' ? { ...value } : {}); const ideaStage = clone(stages.idea_generation); if (!ideaStage.status) { ideaStage.status = 'completed'; } const screenplayStage = clone(stages.screenplay); if (!screenplayStage.status) { screenplayStage.status = 'completed'; } const videoStage = clone(stages.video_generation); if (!videoStage.status) { videoStage.status = 'completed'; } const publishingStage = clone(stages.publishing); const driveFileId = $json.response?.id ?? null; const driveFileUrl = $json.response?.webViewLink ?? null; const publishingOutput = { ...(publishingStage?.output ?? {}), driveFileId, driveFileUrl }; const updatedPublishingStage = { ...publishingStage, status: 'in_progress', output: publishingOutput }; const mergedOutput = { ...(run.output ?? {}), publishing: { ...(run.output?.publishing ?? {}), driveFileId, driveFileUrl } }; return { status: 'running', currentStage: 'publishing', stages: { idea_generation: ideaStage, screenplay: screenplayStage, video_generation: videoStage, publishing: updatedPublishingStage }, output: mergedOutput };
})() }}
